mapper.select: select follow_id, user_id, type, object_id, create_time from mw_follow where follow_id = #{followId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into mw_follow(user_id, type, object_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{type}, #{objectId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select cast(object_id as signed) from mw_follow where type = #{type} group by object_id order by count(*) desc limit 1
